nodes.label: Tests for RTSP startup preflight orchestration.
Preflight should pick the cheapest stream for motion and best stream for recordi
Preflight should fallback to single-stream mode when dual-stream open fails.
Preflight should validate the motion, recording, and preview topology on request
Preflight should validate the preview startup probe used by auto codecs.
Probe-only failures should not skip the actual preview stream capability check.
Preflight should mark concurrent preview unsupported without failing startup.
Preflight should not downgrade preview concurrency on transient validation failu
Preflight should not run preview capability checks unless explicitly requested.
Preflight should fail with negotiation error when all recording profiles fail.
Preflight should probe /stream2 when configured with only /stream1.
Preflight should lock wallclock timestamps when validation shows DTS instability
Recording validation should capture timestamp instability warning signals.
Validation should fail if ffmpeg reports success but no output clip exists.
Session-limit validation should retry when ffmpeg rejects timeout options.
Session-limit validation should fail fast on non-timeout launch failures.
Concurrent preview validation should distinguish session-budget failures.
Concurrent preview validation should keep generic failures unclassified.
Concurrent preview validation should open the same audio track as HLS preview.
Preview probe validation should keep ffprobe connected during overlap.
Session-limit validation should fail when opens die after overlap window.
